description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and stretched representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated limbs and body parts that are unnaturally extended. The figure has a visible head with facial features and hair styled in a ponytail, and is dressed in what seems to be a business suit with a jacket and pants. The arms and legs are disproportionately long and thin, with the hands and feet barely discernible at the ends. The clothing appears to have lapels and a collared shirt underneath the jacket, and the shoes are dark and formal. The overall form is highly abstracted, with the body and limbs warped in a way that makes the figure unrecognizable as a typical human. The surface texture is smooth, with painted-on details for clothing and skin.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure in a business suit with a ponytail, featuring unnaturally elongated limbs and a smooth, painted surface.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the right arm and leg stretched out and the ponytail clearly seen.
description_view_1: The left side of the figure is shown, highlighting the extreme elongation of the limbs and the side profile of the head.
description_view_2: The back and lower body are visible, with the legs and arms appearing as thin, stretched forms.
description_view_3: The left profile of the head and upper body is visible, with the ponytail and suit details more apparent.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and formal jacket
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and distorted, limbs extended
